message:
chore(gitignore): ignore refactor-pass scan inputs, golden workspaces, and perf captures

Three classes of files keep showing up untracked under
refactor/artifacts/<run>/ and tests/artifacts/perf/. The pass
ledgers, scored candidate cards, golden replay JSON, and small
markdown summaries are intentionally tracked; these patterns target
only the obviously-runtime / obviously-bulky pieces:

- refactor/artifacts/*/ast_grep_functions.json — 9.6MB+ AST function
  dump used as scan input by one pass; trivially regenerable.
- refactor/artifacts/*/tests_before.txt
  refactor/artifacts/*/tests_current.txt — raw `cargo test` output,
  ~1.1MB each; the LEDGER and verify_report markdown already
  summarize them.
- refactor/artifacts/*/golden_workspace/ — a live `br` workspace
  (beads.db, .br_history/, .sync.lock, .write.lock, last-touched)
  used to record golden replays. The replay output JSON
  (cards/passN_golden_replay/*.json) is what's tracked; the live
  database fixture that produced it is not.

- tests/artifacts/perf/ — per-run profiling tree, ~2GB on this
  workstation across perf.data files, criterion throughput dumps,
  per-scenario .beads/beads.db workspaces. The bench-summary
  markdown lives elsewhere; this whole tree is raw capture data.
- *.perf.data — also ignored as a defensive match for any perf
  output written outside the canonical tree.

No code changes — pure ignore additions. Existing tracked files
under these paths are unaffected because git doesn't retroactively
remove tracked entries on a new ignore rule.

files.patch:
@@ -169,3 +169,30 @@ report.json
 # but repeat here so they stay ignored on fresh clones or machines
 # without the global entry).
 .ntm/logs/*.log
+
+# Skill-loop / refactor-pass run artifacts that should NOT be tracked.
+# Each pass's directory under refactor/artifacts/ legitimately contains
+# small markdown ledgers, scoring files, and golden replay JSON which
+# are tracked. The patterns below cover the consistently-large or
+# obviously-runtime entries that don't belong in git:
+#  - ast_grep_functions.json: 9.6MB+ AST function dumps used as scan
+#    input for one pass; trivially regeneratable via ast-grep.
+#  - tests_before.txt / tests_current.txt: raw `cargo test` output
+#    captures (1.1MB+ each); the LEDGER and verify_report markdown
+#    summarize them.
+#  - golden_workspace/: a live `br` workspace (beads.db, .br_history,
+#    .sync.lock, .write.lock, last-touched) used to record golden
+#    replays, regenerated each pass.
+refactor/artifacts/*/ast_grep_functions.json
+refactor/artifacts/*/tests_before.txt
+refactor/artifacts/*/tests_current.txt
+refactor/artifacts/*/golden_workspace/
+
+# Per-run perf profiling capture tree (2GB+ of perf.data, beads.db
+# workspaces per scenario, criterion-style throughput dumps). The
+# LEDGER and bench-summary markdown files are written elsewhere by
+# the perf scripts; this tree is purely raw data.
+tests/artifacts/perf/
+tests/artifacts/perf/**/perf.data
+tests/artifacts/perf/**/*.beads/
+*.perf.data
